findings.invariant_violated: Every compatibility or security surface the repo owns has a basis beyond hope for believing it still works.
findings.evidence: The public SDK the repo publishes has no contract tests and no consumer pinning; a breaking change ships undetected until a downstream consumer files a bug.
findings.why_proof_missed: Internal unit tests cover the implementation, but nothing exercises the published surface a consumer depends on.
findings.root_correction: Add contract tests against the published surface and a compatibility policy.
